summary: Completed comprehensive testing of HopeConnect Global Resource Discovery feature using OpenStreetMap Overpass API. All 14 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests verified source filter tabs, resource cards, and all interactive elements work correctly.

code_quality.issue: React warning: Maximum update depth exceeded - likely a useEffect dependency issue
code_quality.note: Does not affect functionality but should be fixed for performance

action_items: Fix React 'Maximum update depth exceeded' warning in Resources.js or related hooks (low priority)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Global Resource Discovery feature fully tested. Discover endpoint queries OpenStreetMap Overpass API and returns live results for Toronto, NYC, London (global coverage). Results are cached in osm_cache MongoDB collection for 6 hours. OSM resources have ids prefixed with 'osm-' and source='osm'. Geolocation is blocked in preview environment so Nearby (Live) tab shows 0 results in UI tests - this is expected behavior. API tests confirm the endpoint works correctly.

backend_apis: Discover results include name, category, lat, lng, distance, address fields ✅
Second call to same coordinates returns cached results ✅
POST /api/resources/{id}/rate - still works for community resources ✅
Auth endpoints (login admin, login demo) - still work ✅
frontend_ui: Resources page renders with source filter tabs (All Sources, Community, Nearby Live) ✅
Source filter tabs show correct counts ✅
Clicking source filter tabs switches between views ✅
Community resources show with share/QR/directions/claim buttons ✅
Claim form opens and displays all fields ✅
Rating section (thumbs up/down) present on all cards ✅
Verified badge displayed on verified resources ✅

notes.geolocation: Geolocation is blocked in preview environment, so Nearby (Live) tab shows 0 results. This is expected - the API works correctly when tested directly.
notes.osm_integration: OpenStreetMap Overpass API integration working correctly with proper User-Agent header. Results cached for 6 hours.
